Container.Name: RustWho
Container.Overview:
RustWho is a clean, secure, and lightning-fast WHOIS, IP, and ASN lookup utility built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - High-performance TCP WHOIS registry socket queries. - Multi-provider IP Geolocation fallback logic. - Comprehensive RIPEstat and PeeringDB ASN details. - Mobile-responsive design, dynamic theme toggling, and print stylesheet. - Offline support via Progressive Web App (PWA) caching.
Container.Requires: Does not require any persistent database path or volume bindings.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4404).

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional access PIN to lock the WHOIS lookup portal. Leave empty for public mode.

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom site title rendered in the web page.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP request origins (CORS). Use '*' to allow all origins.
